text: Welcome aboard, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're glad to have you on the team!
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Excited to have you helping with events!

Welcome aboard, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Looking forward to your contributions!
